description:
Pause for maintainer to make changes and commit. User responds with:
- "ready" — proceed to iteration-review
- "skip review" — skip to finalize-merge (close iteration-review and human-decide as skipped)
- "done" — accept as-is, skip to finalize-merge (close iteration-review and human-decide as skipped)

Exit criteria: User has signaled their intent.
title: Human checkpoint — make fixes

description:
Adopt-PR workflow lifecycle — 8 steps from intake through merge.

This molecule tracks a single adopt-pr run as it moves through intake,
preflight, initial review, human fix, iteration review, human decision,
finalize-merge, and completion. Each step has clear entry/exit criteria.

The formula is structural/documentary — all execution logic lives in the
adopt-pr-auto SKILL.md. The molecule provides observable state: which phase
the run is in, whether it completed or was aborted, and enough context to
resume after a crash.

## Usage

This formula is instantiated by the adopt-pr-auto skill, not by polecats.
Steps are closed via `bd close <step-id>` from the skill session. Do NOT
use `gt mol step done` — that triggers pane respawn logic that doesn't
apply to skill-driven workflows.

## Skip Handling

When the user says "done" or "skip review" during human-fix, the skill
closes iteration-review and human-decide with --reason "skipped" so that
finalize-merge unblocks.
title: mol-polecat-adopt-pr

description:
Clean up refs/adopt-pr/upstream-base. Close control bead with final status.

Exit criteria: All refs cleaned, control bead closed.
title: Cleanup and close

description:
Fetch canonical upstream base. Run /review-pr in PR mode (no posting).
Save the review run_dir for synthesis later.

Exit criteria: Review complete, findings presented, run_dir saved.
title: Run initial code review

preflight, initial review, human fix, iteration review, human decision,
finalize-merge, and completion. Each step has clear entry/exit criteria.

The formula is structural/documentary — all execution logic lives in the
adopt-pr-auto SKILL.md. The molecule provides observable state: which phase
the run is in, whether it completed or was aborted, and enough context to
resume after a crash.

## Usage

This formula is instantiated by the adopt-pr-auto skill, not by polecats.
Steps are closed via `bd close <step-id>` from the skill session. Do NOT
use `gt mol step done` — that triggers pane respawn logic that doesn't
apply to skill-driven workflows.

## Skip Handling

When the user says "done" or "skip review" during human-fix, the skill
closes iteration-review and human-decide with --reason "skipped" so that
finalize-merge unblocks.
title: mol-polecat-adopt-pr

description:
Parse the PR identifier (URL or bare integer), extract owner/repo/number.
Fetch PR metadata via gh. Validate maintainerCanModify is true.
Create the control bead with initial state.

Exit criteria: PR metadata fetched, control bead created, ready for checkout.
title: Parse PR and validate inputs

description:
Check out the PR branch via gh pr checkout. Record ORIGINAL_HEAD.
Display PR summary to the user.

Exit criteria: On PR branch, ORIGINAL_HEAD recorded, user sees summary.
title: Checkout branch and record state

description:
Fetch canonical upstream base. Run /review-pr in PR mode (no posting).
Save the review run_dir for synthesis later.

Exit criteria: Review complete, findings presented, run_dir saved.
title: Run initial code review

description:
Re-fetch upstream base. Run /review-pr in local branch mode against
refs/adopt-pr/upstream-base. Save the run_dir.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: Iteration review complete or step skipped.
title: Re-review after fixes

description:
Pause for maintainer to decide: iterate (back to human-fix) or finalize.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: User chose to finalize.
title: Human checkpoint — iterate or finalize

description:
Re-fetch upstream base. Run /review-pr in local branch mode against
refs/adopt-pr/upstream-base. Save the run_dir.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: Iteration review complete or step skipped.
title: Re-review after fixes

description:
Check out the PR branch via gh pr checkout. Record ORIGINAL_HEAD.
Display PR summary to the user.

Exit criteria: On PR branch, ORIGINAL_HEAD recorded, user sees summary.
title: Checkout branch and record state

description:
Pause for maintainer to decide: iterate (back to human-fix) or finalize.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: User chose to finalize.
title: Human checkpoint — iterate or finalize

description:
Determine merge path (A: squash merge, B: merge commit).
Path B: squash contributor commits if >1, push, verify guardrails.
Both paths: post synthesis comment, wait for CI, merge.

Exit criteria: PR merged successfully.
title: Push, post synthesis, wait for CI, merge

description:
Pause for maintainer to make changes and commit. User responds with:
- "ready" — proceed to iteration-review
- "skip review" — skip to finalize-merge (close iteration-review and human-decide as skipped)
- "done" — accept as-is, skip to finalize-merge (close iteration-review and human-decide as skipped)

Exit criteria: User has signaled their intent.

title: Push, post synthesis, wait for CI, merge

description:
Pause for maintainer to decide: iterate (back to human-fix) or finalize.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: User chose to finalize.
title: Human checkpoint — iterate or finalize

description:
Fetch canonical upstream base. Run /review-pr in PR mode (no posting).
Save the review run_dir for synthesis later.

Exit criteria: Review complete, findings presented, run_dir saved.
title: Run initial code review

description:
Adopt-PR workflow lifecycle — 8 steps from intake through merge.

This molecule tracks a single adopt-pr run as it moves through intake,
preflight, initial review, human fix, iteration review, human decision,
finalize-merge, and completion. Each step has clear entry/exit criteria.

The formula is structural/documentary — all execution logic lives in the
adopt-pr-auto SKILL.md. The molecule provides observable state: which phase
the run is in, whether it completed or was aborted, and enough context to
resume after a crash.

## Usage

This formula is instantiated by the adopt-pr-auto skill, not by polecats.
Steps are closed via `bd close <step-id>` from the skill session. Do NOT
use `gt mol step done` — that triggers pane respawn logic that doesn't
apply to skill-driven workflows.

## Skip Handling

When the user says "done" or "skip review" during human-fix, the skill
closes iteration-review and human-decide with --reason "skipped" so that
finalize-merge unblocks.
title: mol-polecat-adopt-pr

description:
Clean up refs/adopt-pr/upstream-base. Close control bead with final status.

Exit criteria: All refs cleaned, control bead closed.
title: Cleanup and close

description:
Check out the PR branch via gh pr checkout. Record ORIGINAL_HEAD.
Display PR summary to the user.

Exit criteria: On PR branch, ORIGINAL_HEAD recorded, user sees summary.
title: Checkout branch and record state

description:
Parse the PR identifier (URL or bare integer), extract owner/repo/number.
Fetch PR metadata via gh. Validate maintainerCanModify is true.
Create the control bead with initial state.

Exit criteria: PR metadata fetched, control bead created, ready for checkout.
title: Parse PR and validate inputs

description:
Re-fetch upstream base. Run /review-pr in local branch mode against
refs/adopt-pr/upstream-base. Save the run_dir.

May be skipped if user said "done" or "skip review" in human-fix.

Exit criteria: Iteration review complete or step skipped.
title: Re-review after fixes
